positive: A stylized and whimsical illustration of a diverse group of woodland creatures—foxes, hares, bears, and rabbits—gathering in a stylized forest clearing. The scene should be executed in a clean, flat-design silhouette style with intricate black line work and limited color palette (e.g., deep forest green, terracotta, and cream). The main focus is the interconnectedness and joyful interaction of the animals, forming a circular, highly symmetrical composition suitable for apparel. Overhead, large, stylized foliage elements frame the top and sides, creating a central focal point. Studio lighting, vector illustration, highly detailed line art, perfect symmetry, centered composition, clean solid background.
